# SecureLint

Version: 1.0
Website: https://securelint.in
Company: SecureLint
Product Type: AI Browser Security Extension

## About

SecureLint is an AI-powered browser security platform that helps individuals and enterprises prevent sensitive data exposure, phishing attacks, credential theft, and browser-based security risks.

The platform detects and protects sensitive information in real time while users browse the web, compose emails, share screens, and work with cloud applications.

## Core Features

- Sensitive Data Masking
- API Key & Secret Detection
- Password Masking
- Screen Share Privacy
- Browser Data Loss Prevention (Browser DLP)
- Phishing Website Detection
- Phishing Email Detection
- AI Brand Impersonation Detection
- Link Reputation Analysis
- JavaScript Malware Detection
- Wallet Drainer Detection
- Clickjacking Protection
- Pastejacking Protection
- SSL Certificate Validation
- Domain Age & Reputation Analysis
- Password Breach Monitoring
- Browser Threat Intelligence
- Enterprise Security Dashboard

## Solutions

- Browser Security
- Browser DLP
- Enterprise Browser Protection
- Developer Security
- Remote Workforce Security
- Secure Screen Sharing
- Secret & Credential Protection
- AI-powered Phishing Defense

## Industries

- SaaS

- Healthcare

- IT Services
